title: The First Melody
overview: An automata awakens in a basement with no memory or purpose. She is not alone, but her fellow doll sits broken and unresponsive.

title: Playing Alongside the Moon
overview: During an outing, Haizakura's upbeat attitude clashes with Gekka's more stoic personality. How did the automaton become so cold, and why can't she seem to smile anymore?

title: Starry Sky Requiem
overview: Houkiboshi's voice once brought hope to the troops in times of fear and darkness. Now a voice from the past will bring her the same.

title: Fluttering Wings Return
overview: It's only logical to fix a malfunction, but Karasuba is offended that Haizakura suggested Nagi repair her.

title: Singing in the Rain
overview: An automata's philosophical proof of existence can be measured as such: "I have orders, therefore I am." But if that's true, then what is an automata with no orders at all?

title: The Black Cat's Concert
overview: Clients are in short supply after recent incidents involving automata, but Haizakura has an idea to attract new patrons — an idea that requires advice from an unlikely source…

title: Dreamlike Days
overview: While Master Nagi travels abroad on a military mission, the dolls contemplate attending the Capital Fair, and a kindly elderly couple takes a shine to Gekka.

title: Rondo of Eternal Winter
overview: A doll’s duty is never done. After receiving worrisome news, Karasuba and Haizakura venture beyond the walls of the Black Cat on an important mission.

title: A Momentary Sextet
overview: A lost automata wanders into the path of the Black Cat’s staff, but who exactly is she? They’ve never seen a model quite like Haikagura before…

title: Unending Unison
overview: In the wake of disaster, Haikagura sleeps, and her origin remains a mystery. While Nagi investigates the mysterious automata, the other dolls prepare for the Capital Fair.

title: Thunderous War Song
overview: Two sisters, forged in secret. A successor, made in memory. Fragments of the past and future collide as Haikagura attempts to assume control.

title: Let These Feelings Resound
overview: Haizakura knows what she must do to save her friends, but her actions will come at a cost unimaginable. Nevertheless, Haizakura is committed to finding her purpose.
